utterance:
{
  "utterance": "In a world where digital loneliness is rampant, our project, 'EchoMuse', is a platform that uses AI-generated characters to foster meaningful connections and emotional support. These cute, customizable companions help users combat isolation, providing a sense of companionship and purpose.",
  "title": "EchoMuse: AI Companions for Digital Loneliness",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EchoMuse uniquely combines the therapeutic benefits of human-like companionship with the scalability and personalization capabilities of AI, addressing a widespread social issue in a novel and accessible way.",
  "your_role": "presenter"
}

{
  "utterance": "Unlocking the mysteries of radioactivity to develop a new class of targeted cancer therapies, powered by rigorous scientific discovery.",
  "title": "Radiocure",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "Radiocure leverages advanced radioisotope therapy to target cancer cells precisely, minimizing damage to healthy tissues. This project combines cutting-edge research with a tangible social impact, offering hope to millions suffering from cancer.",
  "your_role": "tech_lead"
}

{
  "utterance": "Empowering families to navigate government assistance programs with ease, ensuring no one falls through the cracks.",
  "title": "Government Navigator",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "By leveraging AI to simplify and personalize the application process, we aim to bridge the gap between those in need and available resources, thereby reducing administrative burdens and increasing access to essential services.",
  "your_role": "Team Captain / Chief Morale Officer / Lead Storyteller"
}

{
  "utterance": "In a world where mental health is often overlooked, 'TearStream' is an emotional processing platform that turns your tears into data, helping you understand and heal from your deepest emotions. It’s time to cry and connect, one tear at a time.",
  "title": "TearStream",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "TearStream uniquely combines emotional expression with data analysis to provide a novel approach to mental health, leveraging the act of crying as a form of therapy.",
  "your_role": "Presenter / Demo"
}
